response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the provided JSON and on-screen text. The video begins with a voiced school announcement and dialogue between the performers (neopolabo), followed by a medley of 'BLUE CLAPPER' and 'Hyper Jumpin''. I used on-screen lyrics as the primary guide for spelling and timing, ensuring subtitles are tightly wrapped to the vocal delivery and splitting entries where pauses occur. I have discarded unused lyrics from the reference JSON and focused on the active performances within the clip.

subtitles.original: それでは── これより、学寮祭を開始いたします。
subtitles.english: Well then... From now, we will begin the festival.

subtitles.original: ご来場の皆様、どうぞ最後までお楽しみください。
subtitles.english: Everyone visiting, please enjoy until the end.

subtitles.original: お、やばい！学寮祭始まってるって！
subtitles.english: Oh, gosh! The festival is starting!

subtitles.original: ねねたちも行かなきゃ！
subtitles.english: We have to go too!

subtitles.original: 結局、何も買えなかったんだけど！
subtitles.english: In the end, we couldn't buy anything!

subtitles.original: しゃーなし。戻って学寮祭の話をしますか。
subtitles.english: Can't be helped. Shall we head back and talk about the festival?

subtitles.original: あで... えーっと... これは何をしているの？
subtitles.english: Wait... uh... what are you doing?

subtitles.original: ねねたちには、歌とダンスしかない！
subtitles.english: For us, there's only singing and dancing!

subtitles.original: ならばギリギリまで、全力で練習するしかないっしょー！！
subtitles.english: Then we have to practice with all our might until the very last second!!

subtitles.original: でも、もうお客さん入っているけどね。
subtitles.english: But the audience is already inside.

subtitles.original: あああ、もうやるしかないっ！
subtitles.english: Ahhh, we just have to do it!

subtitles.original: でもさ、肝心の何やるかを決めてないのでは？
subtitles.english: But hasn't the most important thing—what we're going to do—not been decided yet?

subtitles.original: でもさ、お客さんたちが見たいのって、やっぱり私たちらしさだよね。
subtitles.english: But you know, what the audience wants to see is "us-ness" after all.

subtitles.original: それなら... オリ曲じゃない？
subtitles.english: If so... wouldn't it be our original songs?

subtitles.original: じゃあ全部やろう！！
subtitles.english: Then let's do them all!!

subtitles.original: またーーー！？
subtitles.english: Again!?

subtitles.original: 1つだけじゃダメダメ！ 衣装もぜーんぶ着替えて、たくさん歌おうよ！！
subtitles.english: Just one isn't enough! Let's change into all our outfits and sing a lot!!

subtitles.original: メドレーってこと？ お、いいじゃんそれ！
subtitles.english: You mean a medley? Oh, that sounds good!

subtitles.original: おおー、いいかも。
subtitles.english: Ooh, that might be good.

subtitles.original: で、順番はどうするの？
subtitles.english: So, what about the order?

subtitles.original: そんなんパッションでどうにかなるなる！！
subtitles.english: That'll work out somehow with passion!!

subtitles.original: こりゃ大変なことになりそうですね。
subtitles.english: This looks like it's going to be a lot of work.

subtitles.original: ししろん？どうしたの？
subtitles.english: Shishiron? What's wrong?

subtitles.original: いや、何か忘れている気がするんだけど... 思い出せない...
subtitles.english: No, I feel like I'm forgetting something... but I can't remember...

subtitles.original: 大丈夫大丈夫！
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay!

subtitles.original: これを歌えば学寮祭は、ねねたちのもの！！
subtitles.english: If we sing this, the festival will be ours!!

subtitles.original: よっしゃいくぞー！！
subtitles.english: Alright, let's go!!

subtitles.original: 私たちらしさ、見せるよ！
subtitles.english: We'll show them our "us-ness"!

subtitles.original: うんっ、とりあえずやるだけやろう！
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's just do what we can!

subtitles.original: せーのっ！ねぽらぼメドレー！！
subtitles.english: One, two! Neopolabo Medley!!

subtitles.original: 手を上げて Clap your hands 海の向こうまで
subtitles.english: Raise your hands, clap your hands, all the way across the sea

subtitles.original: Clap your hands 届きますように
subtitles.english: Clap your hands, so that it reaches you

subtitles.original: 手を叩こう 手を叩こう
subtitles.english: Let's clap our hands, let's clap our hands

subtitles.original: 光射す 僕たちの未来
subtitles.english: Our future shining with light

subtitles.original: 始めようか さあ Diving
subtitles.english: Shall we begin? Now, diving

subtitles.original: 待っても意味ない Timing
subtitles.english: No point in waiting, timing

subtitles.original: でもたまに止まって Thinking Thinking
subtitles.english: But sometimes stop and keep thinking, thinking

subtitles.original: 変えてみせる Change
subtitles.english: I'll show you I can change

subtitles.original: 踏み出すのさ Stepping
subtitles.english: Stepping forward

subtitles.original: 掴んでみせるよ キラキラ My Dream
subtitles.english: I'll seize my sparkling dream

subtitles.original: 叶う日まで Story 繋ぐから
subtitles.english: Until the day it comes true, I'll connect the story

subtitles.original: だって君に ずっと見てほしいから
subtitles.english: Because I want you to keep watching me

subtitles.english: Raise your hands, clap your hands, all the way across the sea

subtitles.original: Clap your hands 届きますように
subtitles.english: Clap your hands, so that it reaches you

subtitles.original: 手を叩こう 手を叩こう
subtitles.english: Let's clap our hands, let's clap our hands

subtitles.original: ほら一緒に Everybody
subtitles.english: Come on, everybody together

subtitles.original: Clap your hands 空の向こうまで
subtitles.english: Clap your hands, all the way across the sky

subtitles.original: Clap your hands 響きますように
subtitles.english: Clap your hands, may it resonate

subtitles.original: 手を叩こう 手を叩こう
subtitles.english: Let's clap our hands, let's clap our hands

subtitles.original: 光射す 僕たちの未来
subtitles.english: Our future shining with light

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin' Now
subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin' Now

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin'
subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin'

subtitles.original: 子どもくらい はしゃぐ方がお得でしょ
subtitles.english: It's better to frolic like a child, right?

subtitles.original: 低気圧から 追い上がっていくテンション
subtitles.english: Tension rising up from low pressure

subtitles.original: このままスピード加速して
subtitles.english: Accelerating speed just like this

subtitles.original: 辿り着く先に 何があるんだろう
subtitles.english: I wonder what lies at the destination

subtitles.original: 止まらない気持ちは 助走つけて
subtitles.english: Gaining momentum with feelings that won't stop

subtitles.original: 次元を超えて行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go beyond dimensions

subtitles.original: さあ Hyper Jumpin' 飛び跳ねよう
subtitles.english: Come on, Hyper Jumpin', let's leap

subtitles.original: ハイになって 灰になるまで
subtitles.english: Getting high until we turn to ash

subtitles.original: Dancing Shake it up
subtitles.english: Dancing, shake it up

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin' 空の向こうまで
subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin', all the way across the sky

subtitles.original: もっと もっと 近づきたいの
subtitles.english: I want to get closer and closer

subtitles.original: Woh... Woh...
subtitles.english: Woh... Woh...

subtitles.original: ドキドキしたい Give me give me give me love
subtitles.english: I want my heart to throb, give me give me give me love

subtitles.original: Woh... Woh...
subtitles.english: Woh... Woh...

subtitles.original: もっと もっと 高く飛びたいの
subtitles.english: I want to fly higher and higher

subtitles.original: Don't say No No
subtitles.english: Don't say No No

subtitles.original: 好きなら More More More
subtitles.english: If you like it, more, more, more

subtitles.original: 邪魔するノイズは 吹き飛ばせ Bang Bang Bang
subtitles.english: Blow away the interfering noise, bang bang bang

subtitles.original: 遊びたいだけ アンチは無視して
subtitles.english: Just want to play, ignore the haters

subtitles.original: 笑い飛ばして 蹴飛ばせ Kick it!
subtitles.english: Laugh it off and kick it away, kick it!
